title: Large Oval Disposable Aluminium Foil Trays for Baking, Roasting, Broiling, Cooking, Food Storage & Party Use – Premium Quality 46 x 36 x 8 cm, Pack of 3, Ideal for BBQs, Catering, and Meal Prep
features: Premium Quality Aluminium Foil Trays: Durable, heavy-duty disposable foil pans designed for baking, roasting, broiling, and cooking a variety of dishes with ease.
Large Oval Gastronorm Size: Measuring 46 x 33 cm, these oval aluminium trays are perfect for BBQs, grilling, and large family meals, offering ample space for roasting meats, vegetables, and more.
Convenient and Disposable: These disposable aluminium trays eliminate the hassle of cleaning up after cooking, making them ideal for meal prep, food storage, and catering events.

Ideal for Parties & Catering: Perfect for serving food at parties, events, and gatherings, these trays are designed to be versatile and practical for food transport and easy serving. Please note: Actual product patterns may differ slightly from the images

Oven & Freezer Safe: Suitable for both oven and freezer use, these trays are perfect for storing leftovers or preparing meals ahead of time, making them a must-have for home cooking and meal planning.
description: Product Description Large Oval Disposable Aluminium Foil Trays Upgrade your cooking experience with these versatile and durable aluminium foil trays. Perfect for baking, roasting, broiling, and grilling, these trays offer ample space for all your culinary needs. Versatile Aluminium Foil Trays for Cooking and Entertaining Elevate your cooking and entertaining experience with our premium quality aluminium foil trays. Designed for baking, roasting, broiling, and grilling, these large oval trays offer ample space for preparing a variety of dishes. Ideal for BBQs, catering events, and meal prep, these disposable trays eliminate the hassle of cleaning, making them a convenient choice for home cooking and gatherings. Extra-Large Aluminium Foil Roasting Tray – Ideal for Roasting Whole Turkeys, Hams, & Large Cuts of Meat Crafted from high-quality, durable aluminium foil, this large roasting tray is perfect for cooking large meats like whole turkeys, chickens, and hams. Its robust construction ensures even heat distribution, promoting a perfectly cooked meal every time. The tray is also disposable, offering the convenience of easy cleanup – no scrubbing required! Whether you're hosting a festive dinner or preparing a family meal, this tray is the ultimate solution for hassle-free cooking. Heavy-Duty Rolled Edges for Added Strength and Durability The premium rolled edges on this aluminium foil tray provide enhanced strength, preventing tears or bending even under the heaviest loads. This feature makes the tray ideal for handling large roasts or multiple servings at once. The strong construction ensures your food stays securely in place, while the rolled edges make it easy to handle and transport the tray with confidence. Reinforced Ribbed Design for Extra Structural Support & Leak Prevention The built-in reinforcing ribs on this tray provide superior structural support, preventing deformation and leaks. These ribs help the tray maintain its shape, even when filled with heavy, juicy meats. Say goodbye to messy spills and drips! The design ensures that your food stays safely in the tray, and the reinforced base supports the weight of your food without bending or breaking, giving you peace of mind while cooking. Non-Slip Embossed Base for Stability and Safety During Roasting The specially embossed non-slip base provides enhanced stability, ensuring the tray stays securely in place while roasting or grilling. No more worrying about accidental slips or spills! The non-slip surface helps maintain perfect heat distribution and ensures your food remains steady throughout the cooking process. Ideal for use on various surfaces, including ovens, grills, and barbecue setups. Heavy-Duty Aluminium Foil Tray for Ultimate Cooking Convenience Our premium aluminium foil roasting tray offers unparalleled strength, durability, and functionality for all your roasting, baking, and grilling needs. Designed with convenience in mind, this extra-large tray is perfect for a variety of cooking tasks, from roasting whole turkeys and large hams to baking casseroles and grilling meats. With reinforced ribs for added structural integrity, rolled edges for easy handling, and a non-slip embossed base for stability, this tray is the ideal companion for your kitchen and outdoor cooking needs. Easy to clean and disposable, it ensures a mess-free experience every time. Perfect for holiday meals, family gatherings, and BBQ parties, this aluminium foil tray provides the ultimate solution for cooking large portions with ease. Premium Large Oval Disposable Aluminium Foil Trays for BBQs, Roasting & Prep Material High-Quality Aluminium Foil Size 46 x 36 x 8 cm (18.1 x 14.2 x 3.1 inches) Quantity Pack of 3 Shape Oval (Gastronorm Size) Use Baking, Roasting, Broiling, Grilling, Cooking, Food Storage, Party Serving Oven Safe Yes, up to 220°C (428°F) Freezer Safe Yes, suitable for freezing leftovers and meal prep Disposable Yes, easy cleanup, no washing required Weight Capacity Designed to hold heavy roasts, meats, vegetables, and large portions Durability Heavy-duty and reinforced for safe handling Design Features Reinforced edges, leak-resistant base, and non-slip embossed surface Ideal For BBQs, Family Meals, Catering, Parties, Meal Prep, Food Transport, Storage Packaging Pack of 3 Trays (Individually Wrapped) Pattern/Design Actual product patterns may vary slightly from images Certifications Food-grade material, BPA-Free, Eco-friendly Recommended Use Ideal for roasting meats, baking casseroles, grilling vegetables, serving large portions, and food transport
